name: arcade-engine-authorize-tool-request
title: Arcade Engine AuthorizeToolRequest Structure
description: Structural projection of the AuthorizeToolRequest resource of the Arcade Engine API.

next_uri.description: Optional: if provided, the user will be redirected to this URI after authorization

tool_version.description: Optional: if not provided, any version is used

user_id.description: Required only when calling with an API key
